title: hylotelephium argutum subsp. carpaticum
intro: Hylotelephium argutum subsp. carpaticum, also known as the Carpathian stonecrop, is a subspecies of the Hylotelephium argutum plant, which belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This succulent plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Hylotelephium argutum subsp. carpaticum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems.
